title: Time control keybinds
description: Control time at the snap of your fingers!
body:
Ever wanted a mod to stop time at will? But nobody made any? well with this very simple mod you can stop time, slow down, and of course resume time, because nobody wants to be stuck in forever frozen time.



This mod works fully in survival and without cheats on, however it is very overpowered, i might add an item you need to get in order to have the function to stop time, but then again i might just not, idk


Modpack usage: use it in a modpack, sure, but be sure to add a link to this modpage so i can get credit
